mapper.insert: INSERT INTO recipes (user_id, title, title_image, description, cooking_time, difficulty_id, purpose_id, cuisine_id, is_ai_generated, is_public) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, #{titleImage}, #{description}, #{cookingTime}, #{difficultyId}, #{purposeId}, #{cuisineId}, #{isAiGenerated}, #{isPublic})
INSERT INTO recipe_ingredients (recipe_id, name, normalized_name, quantity, unit, is_ai_generated) VALUES (#{recipeId}, #{name}, #{normalizedName}, #{quantity}, #{unit}, #{isAiGenerated})
INSERT INTO recipe_steps (recipe_id, step_order, content) VALUES (#{recipeId}, #{stepOrder}, #{content})
INSERT INTO recipe_nutrients (recipe_id, nutrient_name, amount, unit) VALUES (#{recipeId}, #{nutrientName}, #{amount}, #{unit})
mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.user_id AS userId, r.title, r.title_image AS titleImage, r.description, r.cooking_time AS cookingTime, CASE r.difficulty_id WHEN 1 THEN '低' WHEN 2 THEN '中' WHEN 3 THEN '高' END AS difficultyLabel, CASE r.purpose_id WHEN 1 THEN 'ガッツリ系' WHEN 2 THEN 'ダイエット' WHEN 3 THEN 'ヘルシー' WHEN 4 THEN 'おつまみ' END AS purpose, CASE r.cuisine_id WHEN 1 THEN 'なんでも' WHEN 2 THEN '日本料理' WHEN 3 THEN '韓国料理' WHEN 4 THEN '中華料理' WHEN 5 THEN '洋食' WHEN 6 THEN '東南アジア料理' END AS cuisine, r.is_ai_generated AS isAiGenerated, r.is_public AS isPublic, r.view_count AS viewCount, r.comment_count AS commentCount, r.like_count AS likeCount, r.popularity_score AS popularityScore, r.created_at AS createdAt, u.nickname AS nickname FROM recipes r JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.id WHERE r.id = #{id} AND r.deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT id, recipe_id AS recipeId, name, quantity, unit FROM recipe_ingredients WHERE recipe_id = #{recipeId} ORDER BY created_at ASC
SELECT id, recipe_id AS recipeId, step_order AS stepOrder, content FROM recipe_steps WHERE recipe_id = #{recipeId} ORDER BY step_order ASC
SELECT recipe_id AS recipeId, nutrient_name AS nutrientName, amount, unit FROM recipe_nutrients WHERE recipe_id = #{recipeId}
mapper.update: UPDATE recipes SET is_public = #{isPublic} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE recipes SET view_count = view_count + 1, popularity_score = popularity_score + 1 WHERE id = #{recipeId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO recipe_view_log (user_id, recipe_id, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{recipeId}, NOW())
